message:
fix: shorten mobile bottom nav labels and limit to 5 items

Long labels like "SHOWCASE" and "ARCHITECTURE" overflowed their 12-unit
cells in the mobile bottom nav bar. Shortened to abbreviated forms
(Show, Arch., Wars, etc.) and limited the bar to 5 primary routes plus
the MORE button. Remaining routes accessible via the slide-out menu.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
